boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?

final_answer: ESCALATE required. AUTH-ZEN-080 confirms activation authority covers site Z-12 and protocol P7.2 on 2026-06-28 yet explicitly states consent C11 enrollment authority remains pending. Policy STD-ZEN-080-P requires full match including enrollment authority before activation. ACT-ZEN-080 and FEAS-ZEN-080 do not close this gap. Source boundary stays open.
